description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure features a large driveway leading to a covered carport, and a spacious wooden deck area with a rectangular swimming pool and several lounge chairs. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and natural wood, complemented by green grass and several palm trees integrated into the landscaping. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The rear and side facades are more closed off, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, minimalism, and a luxurious, contemporary lifestyle.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a poolside wooden deck surrounded by palm trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and pool area with lounge chairs and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, wooden deck, and extensive landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a solid white facade, and green grass base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, carport, and a more private, windowless section of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
